2606.06154.title: Amortizing Federated Adaptation: Hypernetwork Driven LoRA for Personalized Foundation Models
2606.06154.paper_summary: Federated fine-tuning of foundation models using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) offers a communication efficient solution for distributed learning. However, existing federated LoRA methods suffer from two fundamental limitations: (1) structural aggregation bias, where independently averaging low rank factors fails to approximate the true combined update, and (2) client side initialization lag, as clients repeatedly reinitialize LoRA parameters across communication rounds, slowing convergence. We propose HyperLoRA, a unified framework that addresses both issues through amortized federated adaptation through hypernetwork-driven LoRA generation and product space aggregation. Instead of iterative per-client optimization, HyperLoRA employs a learned generator that maps client distribution signatures to LoRA initializations, effectively amortizing per client adaptation. On the server side, we introduce a learned aggregation module that directly synthesizes updates in the low-rank product space, eliminating the inconsistencies of factor-wise averaging. A lightweight residual correction module further improves stability under heterogenous (non-IID) client distributions.By replacing iterative optimization and heuristic averaging with learned operators, HyperLoRA jointly enables efficient personalization, unbiased aggregation, and faster convergence. Experiments on federated vision and vision-language benchmarks show that HyperLoRA achieves improved convergence speed, greater robustness to distribution shift, and stronger personalization performance compared to prior federated LoRA methods.
2606.06154.paper_summary_zh: 聯邦微調基礎模型使用低秩適應（LoRA）提供了一種通訊效率高的分散式學習解決方案。然而，現有的聯邦LoRA方法存在兩個根本性限制：（1）結構聚合偏差，獨立平均低秩因子無法逼近真實的綜合更新，以及（2）客戶端初始化延遲，因為客戶端在通訊回合中反覆重新初始化LoRA參數，導致收斂速度變慢。我們提出了HyperLoRA，一個統一框架，通過超網絡驅動的LoRA生成和乘積空間聚合來解決這兩個問題，實現了攤銷的聯邦適應。HyperLoRA不採用逐客戶的迭代優化，而是使用一個學習生成器，將客戶分佈簽名映射到LoRA初始化，有效地攤銷每個客戶的適應。在伺服器端，我們引入了一個學習聚合模塊，直接在低秩乘積空間合成更新，消除了因子平均的不一致性。一個輕量級的殘差修正模塊進一步提高了在異質（非IID）客戶分佈下的穩定性。通過用學習運算元替代迭代優化和啟發式平均，HyperLoRA共同實現了高效的個性化、無偏的聚合和更快的收斂。在聯邦視覺和視覺-語言基準上的實驗顯示，HyperLoRA在收斂速度、對分佈轉變的更大魯棒性以及比先前的聯邦LoRA方法更強的個性化性能方面均有所改善。
2606.06154.author: Sunny Gupta et.al.
2606.06154.authors: Sunny Gupta, Shambhavi Shanker, Amit Sethi
